allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['name'],'→',x['symbol'],x['exchange']\) for x in d[:4]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['name'],'→',x['symbol']\) for x in d[:3]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Secteur:', d['company']['sector']\); print\('Industrie:', d['company']['industry']\)")
